case_title: WINIFRED JIAU VS. ESSES PROPERTY TRUST, INC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE.PLAINTIFF WINIFRED JIAU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ESSES PROPERTY TRUST, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DANILLE REYES (GENERAL MANAGER). DEFENDANT ESSES PROPERTY TRUST, INC. REPRESENTIVE DANIELLE REYES, PRODUCED THE FOOTAGE SUBPOENAED TO THE COURTS. JUDGE PRODUCED FOOTAGE TO PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT INDICATED THAT THEY WOULD PROVIDE THE IDENTITY OF THE RESIDENT RESPONSIBLE FOR THE PROPERTY DAMAGE ALLEGED BY THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT ESSES PROPERTY TRUST, INC. IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MADE A REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE, AND IT WAS DENIED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO HANG LE, 500 FOLSOM ST., SF, CA 94105
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-09-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ESSES PROPERTY TRUST, INC
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF JIAU, WINIFRED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT ESSES PROPERTY TRUST, INC
